title: Structure variation detection
steps: Quick align by BWA BWA 0.6.1 Linux Contig fasta

Exact align by LASTZ LASTZ 1.02 LINUX Contig fasta lastz --targetcapsule=$CAPSULE $FASTA[nameparse=darkspace] --strand=both --chain --ambiguous=iupac --gapped --ydrop=50000 --gap=1000,1 --format=axt --output=$AXT --markend LASTZ aligment

Call SV by SOAPSV. SOAPSV is a huge pipeline, include many programes and scripts. Several commands lines of key steps are showed. SOAPsv 1.02 LINUX LASTZ aligment axtSort $AXT > $SORT_AXT...# find best hit in alignments, alignment linearizationbest_hit $SORT_AXT > $BEST_AXT...intro_indel_1.3 $FINAL_AXT > $SV axtSort $AXT > $SORT_AXT ... # find best hit in alignments, alignment linearization best_hit $SORT_AXT > $BEST_AXT ... intro_indel_1.3 $FINAL_AXT > $SV

Genotyping deletions by Genome STRIP Genome STRIP v1.0 LINUX Merged BAM and site VCF java -cp ${classpath} ${mx} \ org.broadinstitute.sting.queue.QCommandLine \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVGenotyper.q \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVQScript.q \ -gatk ${SV_DIR}/lib/gatk/GenomeAnalysisTK.jar \ --disableJobReport \ -cp ${classpath} \ -configFile genstrip_parameters.txt \ -tempDir ${SV_TMPDIR} \ -R $HG19 \ -genomeMaskFile hg19.mask.101.fasta \ -genderMapFile gender.list \ -runDirectory ${runDir} \ -md ${runDir}/metadata \ -jobLogDir ${runDir}/logs \ -I ${bam} \ -vcf ${sites} \ -disableGATKTraversal \ -O ${genotypes} \ -run || exit 1 SV genotypes in VCF format

Call SV by Pindel PINDEL 0.2.4t LINUX Merged BAM pindel -f $HG19 -i $CFG -o $OUT_PREFIXpindel2vcf -P $PREFIX -r $HG19 -R hg19 -d hg19 -v $VCF pindel -f $HG19 -i $CFG -o $OUT_PREFIX pindel2vcf -P $PREFIX -r $HG19 -R hg19 -d hg19 -v $VCF SV result

Call SV by CNVnator cnvnator 0.2.7 LINUX Merged BAM ./cnvnator -genome hg19 -root out.root -tree $BAM./cnvnator -genome hg19 -root out.root -his 100./cnvnator -root out.root -stat 100./cnvnator -root out.root -partition 100./cnvnator -root out.root -call 100 ./cnvnator -genome hg19 -root out.root -tree $BAM ./cnvnator -genome hg19 -root out.root -his 100 ./cnvnator -root out.root -stat 100 ./cnvnator -root out.root -partition 100 ./cnvnator -root out.root -call 100 SV result

Call SV by Breakdancer Breakdancer-max 1.2 LINUX Merged BAM bam2cfg.pl -q 20 -c 3 -g -h $BAM > $CFGbreakdancer -o $PREFIX -q 20 -d $CTX -a -y 30 $CFG bam2cfg.pl -q 20 -c 3 -g -h $BAM > $CFG breakdancer -o $PREFIX -q 20 -d $CTX -a -y 30 $CFG SV result

Call SV by Genome STRIP Genome STRIP v1.0 LINUX Merged BAM java -cp ${classpath} ${mx} \ org.broadinstitute.sting.queue.QCommandLine \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVPreprocess.q \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVQScript.q \ -gatk ${SV_DIR}/lib/gatk/GenomeAnalysisTK.jar \ -cp ${classpath} \ -configFile conf/genstrip_parameters.txt \ -disableGATKTraversal \ -tempDir ${SV_TMPDIR} \ -R $HG19 \ -computeGCProfiles \ -genomeMaskFile hg19.mask.101.fasta \ -ploidyMapFile hg19.ploidy.map \ -copyNumberMaskFile cn2_mask_hg19.fasta \ -genderMapFile gender.list \ -runDirectory ${runDir} \ -computeGCProfiles \ -md ${runDir}/metadata \ -jobLogDir ${runDir}/logs \ -I ${bam} \ --disableJobReport \ -run || exit 1java -cp ${classpath} ${mx} \ org.broadinstitute.sting.queue.QCommandLine \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVDiscovery.q \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVQScript.q \ -gatk ${SV_DIR}/lib/gatk/GenomeAnalysisTK.jar \ --disableJobReport \ -cp ${classpath} \ -configFile ./genstrip_parameters.txt \ -tempDir ${SV_TMPDIR} \ -R $HG19 \ -genomeMaskFile hg19.mask.101.fasta \ -genderMapFile gender.list \ -runDirectory ${runDir} \ -md ${runDir}/metadata \ -disableGATKTraversal \ -jobLogDir ${runDir}/logs \ -minimumSize 50 \ -maximumSize 1000000 \ -windowSize 20000000 \ -windowPadding 10000 \ -I ${bam} \ -O ${sites} \ -P select.validateReadPairs:false \ -run || exit 1 java -cp ${classpath} ${mx} \ org.broadinstitute.sting.queue.QCommandLine \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVPreprocess.q \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVQScript.q \ -gatk ${SV_DIR}/lib/gatk/GenomeAnalysisTK.jar \ -cp ${classpath} \ -configFile conf/genstrip_parameters.txt \ -disableGATKTraversal \ -tempDir ${SV_TMPDIR} \ -R $HG19 \ -computeGCProfiles \ -genomeMaskFile hg19.mask.101.fasta \ -ploidyMapFile hg19.ploidy.map \ -copyNumberMaskFile cn2_mask_hg19.fasta \ -genderMapFile gender.list \ -runDirectory ${runDir} \ -computeGCProfiles \ -md ${runDir}/metadata \ -jobLogDir ${runDir}/logs \ -I ${bam} \ --disableJobReport \ -run || exit 1 java -cp ${classpath} ${mx} \ org.broadinstitute.sting.queue.QCommandLine \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVDiscovery.q \ -S ${SV_DIR}/qscript/SVQScript.q \ -gatk ${SV_DIR}/lib/gatk/GenomeAnalysisTK.jar \ --disableJobReport \ -cp ${classpath} \ -configFile ./genstrip_parameters.txt \ -tempDir ${SV_TMPDIR} \ -R $HG19 \ -genomeMaskFile hg19.mask.101.fasta \ -genderMapFile gender.list \ -runDirectory ${runDir} \ -md ${runDir}/metadata \ -disableGATKTraversal \ -jobLogDir ${runDir}/logs \ -minimumSize 50 \ -maximumSize 1000000 \ -windowSize 20000000 \ -windowPadding 10000 \ -I ${bam} \ -O ${sites} \ -P select.validateReadPairs:false \ -run || exit 1 SV Result

Combine deletion in individual level between different methods and Combine SV in popluation leverl in different individuals with using in-house scrtips. The methods are similar in 1000 genome paper. Merge exact breakpoint by locations and merge imprecise breakpoint by confident region.
creator: Haoxiang Lin
